basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Laboratory Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 14 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Subordinate Services Selection Board (GSSSB) has released the official Laboratory Technician, Class-3 Notification 2026 on 01-07-2026 at the official website www.gsssb.gujarat.gov.in. A total of 14 vacancies have been announced under the GSSSB Laboratory Technician, Class-3 Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between as per notification with a qualification of Bachelor's degree in Chemistry / Microbiology / Biochemistry / Biotechnology, or Diploma in Laboratory Technician/Medical Laboratory Technician Course, or Post-graduate Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology, or one year

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Chemistry / Microbiology / Bio-chemistry / Bio-technology, Diploma in Laboratory Technician or Medical Laboratory Technician Course or Post-graduate Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology or one year Medical Laboratory Technology Training Course or Laboratory Technician Training Course, Basic knowledge of computer application, Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in Chemistry / Microbiology / Bio-chemistry / Bio-technology obtained from any of the Universities established or incorporated by or under the Central or State Act in India or any other educational institution recognised as such or declared as deemed to be a University under Section 3 of the University Grants Commission Act, 1956. Passed the Diploma in Laboratory Technician or Medical Laboratory Technician Course or Post-graduate Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology or one year Medical Laboratory Technology Training Course or Laboratory Technician Training Course from any of the Government recognised Institution or Universities established or incorporated by or under the Central or State Act in India or any other educational institution recognised as such or declared as deemed to be University under Section 3 of the University Grants Commission Act, 1956. Possess the basic knowledge of computer application as prescribed in the Gujarat Civil Services Classification (General) Rules, 1967. Possess adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. GSSSB Laboratory Technician, Class-3 Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Bachelor's degree in Chemistry / Microbiology / Bio-chemistry / Bio-technology obtained from any of the Universities established or incorporated by or under the Central or State Act in India or any other educational institution recognised as such or declared as deemed to be a University under Section 3 of the University Grants Commission Act, 1956. Passed the Diploma in Laboratory Technician or Medical Laboratory Technician Course or Post-graduate Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology or one year Medical Laboratory Technology Training Course or Laboratory Technician Training Course from any of the Government recognised Institution or Universities established or incorporated by or under the Central or State Act in India or any other educational institution recognised as such or declared as deemed to be University under Section 3 of the University Grants Commission Act, 1956. Possess the basic knowledge of computer application as prescribed in the Gujarat Civil Services Classification (General) Rules, 1967. Possess adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GSSSB Laboratory Technician, Class-3 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the GSSSB Laboratory Technician, Class-3 recruitment is 08-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Laboratory Technician, Class-3 posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies for the Laboratory Technician, Class-3 posts announced by GSSSB.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's degree in Chemistry, Microbiology, Bio-chemistry, or Bio-technology, along with a relevant diploma or training course in Laboratory Technician.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for GSSSB Laboratory Technician, Class-3 posts?
faq.answer: The application for the GSSSB Laboratory Technician, Class-3 posts must be submitted online.
